ART FUNDED CONSERVATION

Tree planting, community stewardship, and sustainable education near Volcanoes National Park — funded by supporters worldwide.

Conservation in motion.

A lightweight animated visual sequence that shows the journey from seedling programs to restored ecosystems.

Tree planting, stewardship, and long-term ecosystem regeneration.

International supporters can choose purpose, amount, and currency — with full visibility into how contributions are used.

International Giving

Invest in Rwanda's ecosystem.

Submit a real donation request in USD, EUR, or RWF. Choose pay-later for testing or configured payment providers for live giving.

  • Direct impact: contributions logged against purpose, amount, and optional campaign.
  • Operational visibility: donations appear in donor dashboard and admin board.
  • Testing-safe: use Confirm Payment Later without live payment setup.
Recommended for testing: use a real name and email, choose a purpose, and leave payment on Confirm Payment Later.

Make a Contribution

Choose an amount, select where it should help most, and submit a real donation record.
